title: Sealed Realm
content:
The 
Sealed Realm
 is the portion of the 
Cave World
 sealed by the 
Realm-Sealing Formation
. It resides beneath the Inner Half of the divided 
Ancient Celestial Realm
.

Structure
[
]

See : 
World

By the time of the 100 year war with the 
Outer Realm
, the 
Sealed Realm
 had around 500,000 Cultivators ready for battle from all four star systems, 97 years later, near the end of the war, they had just 50,000 and only 19 Cultivation Planets.

Noteable Figures
[
]

Previous 
Lord of the Sealed Realm

Wang Lin
 (Current Lord of the Sealed Realm)

]
